title: tinus frangulifolia
intro: Tinus frangulifolia, also known as the Strawberry Tree, is a flowering evergreen shrub native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Tinus frangulifolia include its potential to support digestive health, boost the immune system, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional culinary dishes, such as jams and desserts.
